positive: Minimalist geometric illustration featuring a stylized, celestial mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, gradient cosmic sky. The mountains should be composed of interconnected crystalline and triangular shapes, giving a clean, modern tribal aesthetic. Include abstract constellations made of delicate gold foil lines connecting the peaks. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, electric lavender, ethereal turquoise, and shimmering gold accents. The composition must be highly central, symmetrical, and perfectly balanced for seamless repetition on fabric. Studio lighting, vector art quality, clean lines, crisp edges, maximal contrast.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, low quality, poor detail, noise, excessive color, dirty, complex background, messy, asymmetrical, bad anatomy
